name: Tithe Collapse
description: The Bone Tithe system that sustains resurrection is failing. Tithe tokens are losing value, resurrection costs are spiking, and the dead may soon stay dead permanently.

events.name: Tithe Instability
events.description: The Bone Tithe network is experiencing instability. Resurrection costs have risen.

events.name: Token Crash
events.description: Tithe tokens have lost half their value on the black market.

events.name: Stabilization Effort
events.description: The Bureau is attempting to stabilize the Tithe network. Aid them?
